comment.body: @Alma well I was sure wrong about your levels not reacting in the next session(which I would have thought they would due to my hypothesis dealers hedge not only with futures but in the subsequent days options.) I would love to hear if you think my hypothesis is bollocks or if you think there might be some truth in it.
